headline: How Recent Analyst Shifts Are Reframing The Equinix (EQIX) Investment Story
summary: Equinix’s analyst fair value estimate now sits at US$1,044.61, slightly above the prior US$1,036.41, reflecting a fresh round of price target tweaks across Wall Street coverage. Behind that shift is a tug of war between bullish research highlighting the company’s data center position and more cautious voices focused on how much optimism may already be in the share price. Read on to see how these cross currents are shaping the latest narrative and what to watch as it evolves. Stay updated as...

headline: A Fragile Truce
summary: U.S. stocks rebound as Middle East tensions ease, oil prices fall, and inflation stays lukewarm. Check out the real estate outlook here.
